untranslatable_reason: Signal requires real-time correlation calculation between two external time series (Series A and Series B) and lead-lag analysis. The backtest engine's allowed indicators do not include correlation coefficients, cross-series coherence measures, or lead-lag detection capabilities. These would require custom data input and multivariate statistical functions not present in the allowed indicator set.
translation_notes: Attempted approximation using price-SMA divergence as a proxy for series coherence breakdown, but this does not capture the core requirement of comparing two distinct time series. The signal fundamentally requires correlation monitoring between external series which cannot be expressed with the given indicator vocabulary. Parameters like historical_coherence_threshold (0.6), divergence_correlation_threshold (0.65), and lead_lag_bars (2) cannot be operationalized.
